title: Path Params Helper
description: Exposes a createPathParamsTableNode helper so other plugins (e.g. postman-import) can programmatically generate path-table blocks.

Added: createPathParamsTableNode helper exported from voiden-rest-api for building path-table blocks programmatically
path-table added to the REQUEST_NODES list used for paragraph spacing after request blocks

title: Block Overview Panel Integration
description: Registers block outline metadata for all REST node types so the Block Overview Panel displays them correctly at their document positions.

Added: Block outline metadata registered for all REST node types: headers-table, query-table, path-table, cookies-table, options-table, url-table, multipart-table, json_body, xml_body, yml_body, and file upload — with labels, icons, and row counts
Request node now renders as a block card in the Block Overview Panel at its actual document position, with method and URL shown as a preview
Changed: Request container is no longer merged into the section header; it appears inline with other blocks in document order
Method and URL child nodes are excluded from the block outline as standalone entries since their data is surfaced through the request block card preview

Added: Register help entries in the command palette for HTTP headers, body types, query params, path params, cookies, and request options

title: Build & Shim Fixes
description: Build system improvements and yaml shim support for reliable OTA loading.

Fixed: Removed catch-all shim that caused xs is not a function runtime error
Added yaml to host-provided shims so YAML body type loads correctly

title: Multipart & Pipeline Improvements
description: Reliability improvements for file uploads and request pipeline hooks.

Improved: Multipart file upload now supports multiple files per key
Request pipeline hook ordering made deterministic
Fixed: URL-encoded body correctly encodes special characters
Response body syntax highlight no longer flickers on large payloads

title: SDK Pipeline Architecture
description: Full rewrite on the new SDK pipeline architecture.

Added: New SDK-based request and response pipeline handlers
cURL import via paste with full header and body parsing
History API integration with custom cURL builder
Improved: All HTTP methods including multipart file uploads
Environment variable substitution across all block types
